name: Dr. Raghavender Medishetty
title: Assistant Professor, Department of Chemistry
biography: Dr. Raghavender Medishetty is a leading researcher in the field of functional molecular crystals. His work focuses on how light-driven structural transformations can be harnessed for mechanical motion and tunable optical properties.

At IIT Bhilai, he leads the Medishetty Group, mentoring a diverse team of PhD and Master’s scholars. His research contributions have been widely recognized in journals like Chemical Communications and Inorganic Chemistry.

selectedPublications.authors: A Afzal, M Ahmad, AA Kumar, R Medishetty, et al.
selectedPublications.title: A multifunctional [H2BTC] 2−.[Zn (H2O) 6] 2+ hydrogen-bonded coordination network

selectedPublications.authors: U Kurakula, S Naaz, S Roy, R Medishetty, et al.
selectedPublications.title: Light-driven structural transformations in isotypical Cd (ii) complexes
